mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, monthly_price, yearly_price, description, active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM subscription_plan WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, plan_code, benefit_code, benefit_name, benefit_type, quantity, reset_cycle, overage_policy, credit_cost, active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM subscription_benefit_policy WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY plan_code ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, plan_code, benefit_code, benefit_name, benefit_type, quantity, reset_cycle, overage_policy, credit_cost, active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM subscription_benefit_policy WHERE plan_code = #{planCode} AND active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, plan_code, benefit_code, benefit_name, benefit_type, quantity, reset_cycle, overage_policy, credit_cost, active, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM subscription_benefit_policy WHERE plan_code = #{planCode} AND benefit_code = #{benefitCode} AND active = 1

SELECT id, feature_type, benefit_code, charge_unit, included_in_ticket, default_credit_cost, active, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_feature_benefit_policy WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY benefit_code ASC, feature_type ASC

SELECT id, feature_type, benefit_code, charge_unit, included_in_ticket, default_credit_cost, active, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_feature_benefit_policy WHERE feature_type = #{featureType} AND active = 1

SELECT id, user_id, plan_code, status, started_at, current_period_start, current_period_end, canceled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND current_period_start <= #{now} AND current_period_end > #{now} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, benefit_code, period_start, period_end, granted_quantity, used_quantity, remaining_quantity, source_plan_code, created_at, updated_at FROM user_benefit_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND period_start = #{periodStart} AND period_end = #{periodEnd} ORDER BY benefit_code ASC

SELECT id, user_id, benefit_code, period_start, period_end, granted_quantity, used_quantity, remaining_quantity, source_plan_code, created_at, updated_at FROM user_benefit_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND benefit_code = #{benefitCode} AND period_start = #{periodStart}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_benefit_balance (user_id, benefit_code, period_start, period_end, granted_quantity, used_quantity, remaining_quantity, source_plan_code) VALUES (#{userId}, #{benefitCode}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{grantedQuantity}, #{usedQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{sourcePlanCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_benefit_balance SET used_quantity = used_quantity + 1, remaining_quantity = remaining_quantity - 1 WHERE id = #{balanceId} AND remaining_quantity > 0
UPDATE user_benefit_balance SET used_quantity = CASE WHEN used_quantity > 0 THEN used_quantity - 1 ELSE 0 END, remaining_quantity = remaining_quantity + 1 WHERE id = #{balanceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO benefit_transaction (user_id, benefit_code, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, ai_usage_log_id, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{benefitCode}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{aiUsageLogId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, benefit_code, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, ai_usage_log_id, reason, created_at FROM benefit_transaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
